response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience (10+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, closely matching the required stack. His recent roles at re:cinq and Optilyz demonstrate deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, pricing automation, and scalable systems. He also shows strong architecture skills, testing expertise, and a customer-oriented delivery focus. While his primary languages skew toward TypeScript and D, his Kotlin/Java experience is sufficient for backend services. His open-source contributions and workshops further validate his technical breadth and collaboration skills.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience (10+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, scaling systems, and performance optimization
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (GitHub, workshops, talks)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement), though Node.js proficiency mitigates this
Primary experience in D language may require adjustment to Kotlin/Java for select backend services
Gaps in cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) experience in recent roles; prior DevOps exposure exists
